i consent to undergoing all relevant background checks, including police and financial services checks, as part of the application process

we want to make sure the role is right for you, and you’re right for the role. to do this, we’ll need to get to know you a little better. the information you provide will be used for the sole purpose of assessing your suitability for the position. that’s why it’s important that the information you give us is accurate. if an applicant provides false or inaccurate information, this may result in the termination of the individual’s employment at myob. none of us want that to happen, so make sure you provide us with as accurate information as you can.
are you currently employed by an myob enterprise channel partner?
if yes, please provide the name of the channel partner that you are currently working for?
do you have any criminal convictions or are you currently subject to any criminal investigation?

have you ever been disciplined, dismissed or as a result resigned for any matter in your previous employment including dishonesty, misrepresentation, theft, fraud, complaints or breach of company policies/rules?
what gender do you identify as?
